novel_features.name: Quota forecaster
novel_features.description: Check before a bulk pull whether it fits your remaining hourly/monthly Pexels quota, with a reset ETA.
novel_features.rationale: Pexels drops the X-Ratelimit-* headers on the 429 you most want them on; only a local ledger that persists them across calls can forecast affordable pages.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this before any large download to avoid burning the 200/hour budget mid-batch.

novel_features.name: Best-fit resolution picker
novel_features.description: Pick the smallest photo size or video file that meets a target dimension without upscaling.
novel_features.rationale: Requires encoding Pexels' crop-vs-scale semantics across the 8-size src ladder and video_files against a cached media record.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when you know the media id and need exactly one URL sized for a target, instead of parsing eight src variants.

novel_features.name: Attribution ledger + SOURCES export
novel_features.description: Emit a SOURCES.md and per-file .meta.json sidecars crediting every photographer in your local download ledger.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a persistent downloads ledger correlating media ids, photographers, and URLs that only the local store holds together.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to satisfy Pexels' attribution guideline in one shot rather than hand-building credit lists.

novel_features.name: Dedup + rate-aware bulk download
novel_features.description: Bulk-download a query, skipping media already in your ledger and checkpointing each page so a hit quota stops you gracefully.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a cross-session SQLite ledger join on media id plus live rate-header watching that no stateless wrapper has.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use for repeated or large harvests that must not re-download files or exceed the rate budget.

novel_features.name: Offline re-search of synced media
novel_features.description: Full-text search media you already synced, with stable ordering and no API call.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local FTS index over synced photo alt/photographer/query and video user.name that the live API cannot reproduce.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to re-find media you pulled earlier instead of spending quota on a fresh live search.

novel_features.name: Photographer attribution roll-up
novel_features.description: Group your synced photos by photographer to review credit balance and licensing coverage.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local GROUP BY over the synced photos and download ledger that no single Pexels endpoint exposes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use during a licensing or credit review to see which photographers dominate your pulled set.

narrative.headline: Every Pexels photo, video, and collection endpoint — plus a local store that adds quota forecasting, dedup-aware bulk download, and one-shot attribution exports no other Pexels tool has.
narrative.value_prop: A single binary for the full Pexels API: search and curated photos, video search and popular feeds, and collections including your own. It mirrors results into a local SQLite store so you can re-search offline, dedup downloads across sessions, forecast your rate budget, pick the best-fit resolution for a target, and export license-compliant attribution in one command.
narrative.auth_narrative: Pexels uses a free API key sent as a raw `Authorization: <key>` header — there is NO `Bearer` prefix (the single most common 401 in the ecosystem). Set `PEXELS_API_KEY` or run `pexels-pp-cli auth login`. Every request also sends a User-Agent, since Pexels' edge returns 403 to header-less clients.

quickstart.comment: Confirm the CLI is wired and see whether your API key is detected

quickstart.command: pexels-pp-cli photos search --query "golden retriever puppy" --orientation square --per-page 5
quickstart.comment: Core photo search with Pexels' filters
Dedup-aware download that writes attribution sidecars
Emit SOURCES.md crediting everything you've downloaded

troubleshoots.fix: Your key is likely sent with a Bearer prefix by another tool; this CLI sends the raw key. Verify with `pexels-pp-cli doctor` and re-set via `pexels-pp-cli auth login`.
Header-less clients get Cloudflare-403'd; this CLI sets a User-Agent automatically. If you still see it, your key may be gated — check status.pexels.com.
You hit the 200/hour budget. Run `pexels-pp-cli quota forecast` first, then resume with --max-pages once the reset passes.
Offline search reads the local store; run `pexels-pp-cli sync --resources photos` first, or use `photos search` for a live query.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent or script needs stock photos or video b-roll from Pexels with deterministic JSON output, license-compliant attribution, and rate-budget awareness. It is the right choice for repeated or bulk media harvesting, re-finding previously pulled media offline, and picking exact resolutions for known media ids.
anti_triggers: Do not use this CLI to upload, like, or modify content on Pexels — the API is strictly read-only.
Do not use it as a wallpaper app or to replicate Pexels' core browsing experience; Pexels' guidelines forbid that and gate such clients.
Do not use it for non-Pexels stock sources (Unsplash, Pixabay); it only speaks the Pexels API.

recipes.title: Agent-native photo search, narrowed
recipes.explanation: Returns only the four fields an agent needs from a deeply-nested response, instead of all eight src sizes per photo.

recipes.title: Forecast then harvest
recipes.command: pexels-pp-cli quota forecast --resources photos --max-pages 5 && pexels-pp-cli download "city skyline night" --type photo --limit 50 --max-pages 5 --size large --sidecar
recipes.explanation: Check the rate budget, then run a dedup-aware bulk pull that writes attribution sidecars.

recipes.title: Best-fit resolution for a known id
recipes.explanation: Picks the smallest src/video_file that covers 1080p without upscaling.

recipes.title: Browse your own collections
recipes.explanation: Lists the authenticated user's collections — a surface only two ecosystem tools expose.

recipes.title: Re-find synced media offline
recipes.command: pexels-pp-cli sync --resources photos --max-pages 3 && pexels-pp-cli search "sunset" --type photos --limit 10
recipes.explanation: Mirror a few pages locally, then full-text search them without spending more quota.
